title: CPFP Carve-Out Policy
description: CPFP carve-out is a mempool policy exception intended to make Lightning commitment fee-bumping practical. It affects package acceptance limits and descendant accounting.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: CPFP Carve Out
resources.notes: Policy rationale and Lightning-specific fee-bump behavior.
